; Pixelspace bitmap source — canonical glyph data.
; Format documented in tools/parse_bitmap.py.
; Originally generated by tools/svg_to_bitmap.py from Pixelspace.svg.
; Hand-edits are expected and welcome going forward.

@meta
upem: 875
ascent: 625
descent: -250
cap-height: 625
x-height: 500
default-adv: 750
underline-position: -188
underline-thickness: 125
panose: 2 0 5 9 0 0 0 0 0 0

; Missing-glyph fallback (rendered for codepoints not in the font).

; Box-drawing (U+2500-257F) and Block Elements (U+2580-259F)
; Generated by tools/gen_terminal_glyphs.py — see header for
; design rules. Hand-edits welcome going forward.
